_comment: Per-store LAUNCH ACCOUNT + identity override. Read by the app (effectiveAccount for display + the /api/launch-submit build request) AND the launch_build_worker. Redirects a store's launch to a DIFFERENT ad account + full identity WITHOUT touching clickup_structure — so the store's insights/stats stay on its real account. The override account is treated as an ALLOWED target (containment passes) because it is an explicit, authorized redirect. Delete a store's entry to send its launches back to the registry account.

cake_craft_academy.note: TEST OVERRIDE (Lolis test account). CCA-named launches build on the $20 Lolis test account, never CCA's real act_797306028304336. Remove after the rehearsal.
